---
title: "Alice Perrin"
---

## Alice Perrin

**Dates:** (b. Otterbourne 1864/5)

### Description

domestic servant

### Biography

She appears in the 1881 census as a domestic servant in Otterbourne.  Sister of Frances Elizabeth Perrin and daughter of George Perrin, labourer, of Otterbourne.  In the 1891 census she was married to a bricklayer named Edward Gray.

### Letters

- Letter from Oct 7th 1878

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
